title: OKX expands X-Perps in Europe with Magnificent 7, gold and oil futures
summary: OKX rolls out tokenized stock and commodity perps for EU retail traders, expanding competition with Coinbase, Kraken and Binance in regulated derivatives.

title: SBI Shinsei links bank deposits to crypto rewards in Japan: Nikkei
summary: SBI will give out vouchers that can be redeemed for Bitcoin, Ether or XRP through SBI VC Trade, linking bank savings with the group’s crypto exchange arm.

title: Stocks Climb as AI-Led Rebound Enters Day Two: Markets Wrap
summary: A recovery in the artificial-intelligence trade carried into a second day, with oil prices falling as hostilities in the Middle East eased.

title: BNP Sees Three Fed Rate Hikes Starting in December
summary: Guneet Dhingra, head of US rates strategy at BNP Paribas, discusses the inflation risks he sees in markets and explains how the firm came to expect three rate hikes coming from the Federal Reserve. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: This is Bitcoin's Shallowest Bear Market—But is the Bottom In?
summary: Bitcoin is down 50% from its all-time high in the shallowest bear market to date—but analysts caution that the bottom isn't in yet.

title: Morning Minute: Saylor is Back to Buying
summary: Saylor answers doubts with a $100M purchase. Citrini just called Hyperliquid a buy. And SBF is formally asking Trump for a pardon.

title: Starknet rolls out ZK privacy layer for ERC20 balances and transfers
summary: STRK20 went live on Starknet, bringing private ERC20 transfers and balances with targeted disclosure mechanisms for regulators.

title: Zodia Custody secures Luxembourg payment institution license to expand EU stablecoin services
summary: Zodia Custody secured a Luxembourg payment licence from the CSSF, enabling regulated stablecoin custody and transfers across the EU.

title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off
